# Freight Bridge LLC — Cedar Rapids Data Center Services
> Post-Construction Cleanup & Removal for Data Center Projects

## NAP
- Name: Freight Bridge LLC — Cedar Rapids Data Center Services
- Address: Cedar Rapids, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
- Phone: (641) 451-3132
- Email: info@freightbridgellc.com

## Hours
Mon-Fri 6AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun Closed

## Domain
https://cedarrapids.freightbridgellc.com

## Description
Freight Bridge LLC provides professional post-construction cleanup, debris removal, and decommissioned equipment hauling for data center construction projects in the Cedar Rapids corridor — serving the Big Cedar Industrial Center and surrounding developments. Owner-operated with hands-on supervision of every load.

## Owner
Mohamed Soliman

## Payment Accepted
Credit Card, Wire Transfer, ACH, Invoice (Net 30)

## Year Established
2010
